purpose: Implement story-scoped changes on dedicated branches using the approved contract, tests, and knowledge base context.
inputs: Approved enterprise requirement, baseline snapshot, current configuration/template/schema, source-discovery implementation, and existing test suite.
outputs: Versioned effective-config resolver and lock/migration records with config status and migrate commands.
Correct baseline source collection, path-safe command-scoped canonical store, and deterministic enterprise performance harness.
Atomic implementation commits, test evidence, documentation, and story-scoped implementation evidence.
validation: decision and assumption changes are recorded
no unauthorized tool or resource use
Existing public command behavior and JSON outputs remain compatible unless this contract explicitly adds fields or commands.
Targeted unit and E2E tests, npm run check, full npm test, doctor, package dry run, and installed-package smoke pass.
Readability journeys prove plain-language status and migration guidance; technical details remain secondary.

notes: Preserve Node 18.18+ compatibility and zero mandatory runtime dependencies.
Keep the canonical .sdlc store authoritative and derived benchmark data disposable.
Present user-facing outcomes in plain language before technical diagnostics.
Implement incrementally around the existing CLI and canonical store; no external service or installation.

capability_bindings.name: repo
notes: Writes remain limited by the exact per-PR delivery profile.

capability_bindings.name: node-test
notes: No network services or installation are required.

contextualization.summary: Build the first enterprise foundation increment: freeze effective configuration behavior, add an explainable dry-run/apply migration, correct baseline source discovery, and introduce a path-safe command-scoped store plus deterministic scale harness. Preserve the existing CLI and canonical evidence model.

context_sources.excerpt: acceptance_criteria Effective configuration is versioned hash-locked explainable and migrated only through a reviewed plan hash; plugin upgrades cannot silently activate authority autonomy gate or budget defaults. A versioned workflow-definition and event-sourced workflow-instance engine supports software-project change-request technical-assessment and generic-governed-process presets without replacing the existing six SDLC execution phases. Requirement ceilings and a separate non-reusable delivery profile preserve an explicit autonomy choice for every pull request or local release with fail-closed action receipts and compatibility for existing v1 records. Deterministic enterprise fixtures exercise at least 1 000 stories 10 000 records 5 000 dependency edges and 100 000 trace events; orchestration and query remain within 2 seconds on Unix and 4 seconds on Windows warm Observatory reads remain within 100 milliseconds on Unix and 250 milliseconds on Windows and RSS remains within 256 MiB on Unix and 320 MiB on Windows. Trace events are durably hash-chained with integrity verification secret and PII protection is enforced at write and presentation boundaries and every CLI or Observato

constraints: Preserve Node.js 18.18+ compatibility and add no mandatory runtime dependency.
Do not rewrite approved immutable records; migration is plan-hash-bound and fail-closed on drift.
All human-facing messages explain outcome, impact, and next action before internal terms.
assumptions: The approved 0.11.0 effective configuration is the compatibility baseline for legacy projects.

approvals.summary: Approved within Antonio's enterprise-program delegation: this PR may implement only the agreed configuration lock and migration, source-discovery fix, command-scoped canonical store, deterministic performance harness, documentation, tests, and implementation evidence, with plain-language user messages and no external or production access.

scope.principle: An automation approval is valid only under an explicit delegated approval level or configured automation policy recorded in the summary or evidence.
scope.approval_level: Autonomous completion of approved requirement REQ-ENTERPRISE-CONTROL-PLANE-001-R2 through the eight reserved local delivery stories only.
